text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Within me resides something akin to a fierce
blaze.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's a savage inferno that scorches the earth and
devours everything in its path—a chaotic blaze
that remains unsatiated even after turning all to
ash.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Deep inhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Deep exhale...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Good.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm. It's about time to go back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, Yaeno Muteki and I are taking on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Good day, Trainer. I'm ready to begin training
once again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In keeping with her nature as a martial artist, she
offers me a courteous greeting.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've already finished my warm-up run, so I'd like
to jump straight into practice.
choice_data_list: Let's start with three incline dashes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Understood!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Whew... It's done.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Right.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Hey! I booked this time slot!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: No, I booked it! Look! I even got an email confirmation!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Well, I got an email too! ...Huh. Did they
double-book it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Two runners are arguing on the neighboring lane
at the track. It sounds like there's been a system
error and the reservation got duplicated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though neither one of them is at fault, the
dispute gradually intensifies.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Let's settle this with a race! The winner gets to use
the track! How about it?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Suits me just fine! I'll take the victory and the time
slot along with it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Sorry to intrude, but can I offer a suggestion?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm only wondering if the present moment is the
right time for a race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
With all due respect, you both seem to have lost
a degree of composure.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Running while angry is likely to end in injury.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have no doubt that hurting yourself in such a
meaningless race would only lead to regret.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't it be wise to conserve that energy for
the crucial races to come?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: Ugh, it's not that simple!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome to use my lane if you'd like. As
you can see, I'm taking a break right now, so I
don't mind you using it for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text: B-but why? This isn't your problem...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, would it be possible to change the order
of our exercises today?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It should be fine to keep using the track even
after my break's over. I'll be back in thirty
minutes, so—

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
No, no, don't worry about it! We'll just take turns
using the one we booked!
We can alternate, right?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! But it'd be great if we could use your lane
just while you're on break!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your consideration. I'll see you again
shortly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. That matter wouldn't have
been settled without your cooperation.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I used to react the same way and jump
immediately into challenges when I found myself
in similar arguments long ago.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Before, I was nothing more than a little brute
governed by desire and raw emotion. I tried to
bend others to my will through sheer force.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I was fortunate that my grandfather is a
master of the openhanded Kongo Yaegaki style.
He trained me and taught me to balance the
blaze fierce and water still.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The style comprises the savage instinct of raging
fire and the tranquility of the water that pacifies
it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
By uniting these two elements into a single
Yaegaki kata, I was able to use the Kongo
Yaegaki style to control my inner spirit.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Though I'm still inexperienced, I'm proud to have
been able to calmly handle that situation earlier.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I plan to continue dedicating myself to
self-improvement. Naturally, this applies to my
racing efforts as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will achieve mastery of both blaze fierce and
water still with the strategy we developed
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our strategy for controlling her fighting spirit was
something the two of us devised before I was
even officially her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she's usually calm and relaxed, Yaeno
Muteki's dormant inner fire awakens when it's
time to race, and it tends to take over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was my curiosity about her two-sided nature
that led me to reach out to her, and from there,
we set about devising a way for her to tame that
fierce spirit of hers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We concluded that we could use racing strategy
in the same way she uses the martial arts forms, or
katas, from the Kongo Yaegaki style—to quell her
fiery spirit until the right moment.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The racecourse is the perfect place for me to
channel my fiery spirit into a source of strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I intend to attain results in the racing world that I
can be proud of. That is how I will repay my
grandparents for taking care of me for so many
years.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That is my earnest hope.
choice_data_list: Then let's do our best in the Twinkle Series!
Then let's do our best in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's vital that we start out on the right foot.
First off, I need to have a great debut race.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Let's resume practice, please!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Yaeno! Are you just on your way back
home?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Chiyono O. Yes, we're heading back to the
dorm now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is Sakura Chiyono O, a runner known for her
diligence and earnest nature. She's one of Yaeno
Muteki's peers and has already debuted.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're still training at this hour? You're just
full of energy!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, well, my debut race is coming up. You're out
late yourself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I assume you've been training as well?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I guess the cat's out of the bag.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I mean, at this rate, we'll end up facing off
against each other in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This is how it goes. "First you prepare, then you
run, and that's when the joy will come!" I've got to
train hard to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Pardon the intrusion, but I believe this concerns
me as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The person joining the conversation is Mejiro
Ardan, a young lady of the Mejiro family. I hear
that her frail body limits the extent to which she
can safely exert herself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Good evening, Ardan. Has your debut race been
decided as well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We don't yet have an exact date, but I assure you, I will be debuting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Come what may.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It seems your heart is set on it. I'll take that to
heart as well.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And I'll ask that neither of you hold back when we
clash on the track one day!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I wouldn't dream of it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm in this to win it too!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Very well. That will make defeating you all the
more worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sparks fly between the three of them as they lock
eyes. Perhaps in response to the tension in the
air, their smiles brim with bold confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Yaeno Muteki's heated battle begins.
First off, I need to help her secure a victory in her
debut race!
